SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO FIFTH THIRD BANK,

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ADEEL MAHMOOD IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT FIFTH THIRD BANK, REPRESENTED BY ALEX GIRARD, COLLECTINS RECOVERY MANAGEMENT SUPERVISOR IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT IN COURT BY 10:30 A.M. AND THE MATTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
